raw_response_text:
<features>
- fur texture: curly/wavy and thick
- fur color: light brown/tan
- snout shape: prominent with a large black nose
- facial features: dark eyes, tongue slightly visible
</features>

<kb>
- IF [fur texture = curly/wavy AND fur color = light brown/tan] THEN [35]
- IF [fur texture = smooth AND fur color = grey] THEN [9]
- IF [fur texture = smooth AND fur color = grey AND sitting on books] THEN [27]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The rule for class 35 fires because the Query Image shows an animal with thick, curly/wavy, light brown/tan fur, which matches the visual pattern seen in the first example.
</rule_check>

<response>35</response>

<features>
- animal type: cat
- fur color: grey/light grey
- eye color: yellow/amber
</features>

<kb>
- IF [animal type = dog] THEN [35]
- IF [animal type = cat AND fur color = dark grey] THEN [9]
- IF [animal type = cat AND fur color = light grey] THEN [27]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The rule for class 27 fires because the Query Image shows a cat with light grey fur.
</rule_check>

<response>27</response>

raw_response_text:
<features>
- animal type: cat
- fur color: grey
- setting: outdoors on a brick wall
</features>
<kb>
- IF [animal type = dog] THEN [35]
- IF [animal type = cat AND fur color = grey AND setting = indoors] THEN [9]
- IF [animal type = cat AND fur color = grey AND setting = outdoors] THEN [27]
</kb>

<rule_check>
- The rule "IF [animal type = cat AND fur color = grey AND setting = outdoors] THEN [27]" fires because the image shows a grey cat in an outdoor setting on a brick wall.
</rule_check>

<response>27</response>
